SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationDocumentWriteAccess

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationBlockElement, AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationContainerElement, AIiDocumentationContainerElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationDocument, AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationDocument
public interface AIiDocumentationDocumentWriteAccess extends AIiDocumentationDocument, AIiDocumentationContainerElementWriteAccess
Provides write access to a documentation document.

The read-only contract is defined by AIiDocumentationDocument. This capability interface is intended for construction, aggregation, and model-processing phases. Validators, renderers, and other read-only consumers should depend on the read-only interface instead.

This interface currently adds no type-specific write operations. It mirrors the documentation element hierarchy and inherits the write capabilities of its parent write-access interface.
